hero.name: Cao Tan Cong
hero.title: Software Developer
hero.subtitle: Starting from the effort to master digital platforms, my journey goes beyond theoretical experimentation. In the age of artificial intelligence, I focus on transforming complex problems into adaptive technology solutions that operate in the real world and optimize performance.
hero.subtitle2: Rather than building isolated applications, my goal is to architect intelligent and sustainable digital ecosystems — where every line of code is not just technical language, but a commitment to structure, security, and scalability — harnessing the power of AI to redefine how people interact, connect, and operate alongside technology every day.

about.description1: Carrying the mindset of a new tech generation, ready to dive in and contribute to the wave of global innovation. Always pioneering the exploration of cutting-edge knowledge to transform ideas into practical, breakthrough solutions that create real value for the community.
about.description2: Mastering multi-platform programming thinking with the ability to operate flexibly across modern frameworks. Championing the philosophy of Clean Code, sustainable architecture, and standardized system design principles — ensuring every digital product achieves optimal stability and unlimited scalability.

info.name: Full Name
info.address_value: Tan Binh, Ho Chi Minh City

project1.title: Tafas.vn — Women's Fashion E-commerce
project1.description: The goal of Tafas.vn was to build a women's fashion e-commerce platform that helps the business centrally manage website content, products, and members. I was responsible for the admin foundation (base admin), website management modules, product management modules, and member management modules. Tech stack: NestJS, Next.js, and MySQL.

system.title: System Configuration
items: Built admin base (layout, menu, module routing)
Basic admin authentication and session handling

promotions.title: Promotions & Loyalty
items: Not included in my implementation scope

inventory.title: Inventory Management
items: Not included in my implementation scope

customers.title: Customer Management
items: Not included in my implementation scope

project2.title: SmartMath
project2.description: The goal of SmartMath was to help schools and training centers digitize student and teacher management on a unified platform. I focused on building the admin interface, implementing student and teacher management features, and integrating APIs for core workflows using ReactJS and ExpressJS.

website.title: Admin Pages
items: Designed layout, sidebar, and module navigation
Structured pages for easy future extension

system.title: Student Management
items: Implemented create, update, and delete for student data
Added basic student search and filtering

products.title: Teacher Management
items: Implemented create, update, and delete for teacher data

members.title: Work Scope
items: ExpressJS API integration for management flows
Completed student and teacher management modules

project3.title: Transportation Management Platform - SOF Company
project3.description: Project delivered for SOF company (sof.com.vn): completed a transportation platform with a customer mobile app using Google Maps API for address selection, a driver mobile app for order handling, navigation, and trip completion, and a web admin portal to manage end-to-end logistics progress.

website.title: Mobile App Customer
items: Created transportation orders based on shipment demand
Integrated Google Maps API for pickup and delivery address selection
Tracked order status through each delivery stage
Confirmed order completion after delivery handoff

system.title: Mobile App Driver
items: Received and accepted matching delivery orders
Displayed optimal routes with turn-by-turn navigation support
Updated trip progress in real time
Recorded movement history throughout the trip
Completed trips and confirmed final handoff

products.title: Web Management Portal
items: Managed orders and dispatch workflow in one place
Monitored transportation progress across active trips
Supervised processing status for customers and drivers

members.title: Technology Stack
items: Google Maps API for geocoding, routing, and location tracking
Web admin system for operation management
Synchronized data flow across all user roles

project4.title: TCShop E-commerce Website
project4.description: TCShop is a customizable e-commerce website that can be adapted to sell different product categories, without being limited to a specific niche. It includes an admin panel to manage products, orders, and users. The project was built with Laravel 11.

project5.title: Mobile Phone E-commerce Website
project5.description: A mobile phone e-commerce website with an admin panel to manage products, orders, and customers. The project was built with ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server, and Web API.

project6.title: Restaurant Management Software (Dev Express)
project6.description: A restaurant management desktop application with an advanced interface for daily operations and centralized data handling. The project was built with .NET C# WinForms, Dev Express, and SQL Server.

project7.title: Shopee-like Web UI
project7.description: Responsive front-end UI inspired by Shopee e-commerce platform, built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.

job1.title: Freelancer - Sales & Project Development
job1.description: Worked as a freelancer responsible for sales and project development at COVASOL (covasol.com.vn), consulting solutions based on client needs and coordinating delivery progress to ensure both business outcomes and quality execution.

job2.title: Web & Mobile App Developer
job2.description: Worked on website and mobile app development for SOF (sof.com.vn), focusing on feature implementation, performance optimization, and stable user experience delivery.

job3.title: ASP.NET & Desktop Developer
job3.description: Built an ASP.NET MVC e-commerce site for phones & accessories and a .NET WinForms restaurant POS system with Dev Express components and SQL Server.

edu1.school: Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry and Trade (HUIT)
edu1.description: Studying Information Technology with a focus on software engineering, web development, and mobile application development.

edu2.description: Completed general education with strong results in mathematics and natural sciences.
